steps.title: Identify what differs between the two works
steps.content: The task asks which choice “emphasizes a difference” between Water Line and Seven Earth Mountain. The notes reveal they differ in material: Water Line is composed of aluminum tubing, while Seven Earth Mountain is composed of soil.

steps.title: Find the choice that contrasts the materials
steps.content: Choice A directly emphasizes this distinction with “by contrast” and explicitly names each work's material—aluminum tubing versus soil. This is the only choice that includes both works in direct comparison. Choices C and D each mention only one work; choice B treats the works as similar examples rather than highlighting their difference. That matches choice A — A is correct.
